dashboard.title: Stock overview
dashboard.subtitleAfter: — updated from the latest data in Supabase
dashboard.sectionMetricsDesc: All units, booked (not yet exported), exported, and ready stock (buyer / shipped / booked_shipping empty) — excluding cancel
dashboard.sectionSalesDesc: Units and total value per buyer (buyer column) — donut chart with a color per buyer

kpi.bookedSub: Buyer set — shipped and booked_shipping both empty
kpi.bookedLink: Open booked-not-exported list — buyer, sale support, days since booked date
kpi.exportedSub: shipped or booked_shipping has a value
kpi.availableSub: buyer, shipped, and booked_shipping all empty

insights.buyerDescAfter: — sorted by count (high to low); units, total THB (buy_price / price_thb), and share — donut chart with a color per buyer
insights.buyerEmpty: No buyer data in the buyer column yet
insights.agentLast3MonthsCaption: Purchase month: previous month only by income_date
insights.agentEmpty: No current-month agent data for Buyer = BE FORWARD
insights.agentInteractionHint: Tap/click agent name or bar to move selected names to top, sorted high to low
insights.agentMobileHint: Tap agent name or bar to compare, then use full screen for mobile view.
insights.agentCompareHint: Tap agent name or bar to start comparing (unlimited selections).
insights.agentFullscreenLandscapeHint: Fullscreen works best in landscape mode.

statusesPage.title: Cars by status
statusesPage.intro: Only non-cancel cars — matches "All cars" on the main page. Total value uses buy_price (same as KPI total value).

bookedPage.title: Booked (not exported)
bookedPage.intro: Buyer is set and both shipped and booked_shipping must be empty — excluding cancel — oldest bookings first (by booked_date)
bookedPage.chartTip: Tip: Click a sale support name in the chart or list to scroll to that group in the table below. In the group header, use Share to copy a link you can send to others.
bookedPage.chartDesc: Booked (not exported) distribution by sale support, sorted high to low.

exportedPage.title: Exported — by buyer
exportedPage.introAfter: (either) and excluding cancel — matches the "Exported" KPI.
exportedPage.monthlyChartEmpty: No shipped values that can be parsed into months
exportedPage.unknownMonthRows: Rows with unparseable month from shipped
exportedPage.chartClickHint: Click a month bar (or the All bar) to update the details below.
exportedPage.modelYearChartIntro: Grouped by the model_year column only (empty → “no year”). Same exported set as above.
exportedPage.modelYearChartEmpty: No exported rows to chart by model year

availablePage.title: Ready / in stock
availablePage.intro: This page shows cars where buyer, shipped, and booked_shipping are all empty (excluding cancel). Stock age is counted from income_date to today.

websitePendingPage.title: Not on website vigoasia
websitePendingPage.intro: Shows cars that are ready for sale + status P.Office + empty picture (treated as not posted to website), including who (sale support) still has pending units.

websitePendingBeForwardPage.title: Not on website beforward
websitePendingBeForwardPage.intro: Uses the same base logic as vigoasia (ready for sale + status P.Office), but checks BF on web containing "Not".
websitePendingBeForwardPage.empty: No cars pending beforward website posting

incomeSchedulePage.title: Daily payment & receiving schedule
incomeSchedulePage.intro: Grouped by income_date to show how much money (buy_price / price_thb) should be paid and how many cars are received each day.

ordersMobile.title: Order Tracking
ordersMobile.intro: Read-only mobile view for Sales, Store, and Garage teams.
ordersMobile.tableNotReady: Order tracking tables are not ready yet in Supabase.

error.title: Could not connect to the database
error.hint1b: the column name in code does not match the table — update the code or align with a SQL view.
error.hint2c: role can read the cars table
